certs_select_own.name: certs_select_own
certs_select_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

certs_insert_own.name: certs_insert_own
certs_insert_own.withCheck:
cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())
        AND status = 'pending_review'
        AND reviewed_at IS NULL
        AND reviewed_by IS NULL
        AND review_notes IS NULL

certs_delete_own_pending.name: certs_delete_own_pending
certs_delete_own_pending.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) AND status = 'pending_review'

cook_profiles_select_active.name: cook_profiles_select_active
cook_profiles_select_active.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.id = cook_profiles.user_id AND u.status = 'active')

ingredients_select_active_listing.name: ingredients_select_active_listing
ingredients_select_active_listing.using: listing_id IN (SELECT id FROM listings WHERE status = 'active')

ingredients_select_own.name: ingredients_select_own
ingredients_select_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

ingredients_insert_own.name: ingredients_insert_own
ingredients_insert_own.withCheck: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

ingredients_update_own.name: ingredients_update_own
ingredients_update_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

ingredients_delete_own.name: ingredients_delete_own
ingredients_delete_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

nutrition_select_active_listing.using: listing_id IN (SELECT id FROM listings WHERE status = 'active')

nutrition_select_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

nutrition_insert_own.withCheck: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

nutrition_update_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

photos_select_active_listing.using: listing_id IN (SELECT id FROM listings WHERE status = 'active')

photos_select_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

photos_insert_own.withCheck: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

photos_update_own.name: photos_update_own
photos_update_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

photos_delete_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

listing_tags_select_all.name: listing_tags_select_all
listing_tags_select_all.using: listing_id IN (SELECT id FROM listings WHERE status = 'active')

listing_tags_insert_own.name: listing_tags_insert_own
listing_tags_insert_own.withCheck: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

listing_tags_delete_own.using: listing_id IN (SELECT l.id FROM listings l JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid())

listings_select_own.name: listings_select_own
listings_select_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

listings_insert_own.name: listings_insert_own
listings_insert_own.withCheck:
cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())
        AND status = 'draft'
        AND reviewed_at IS NULL
        AND reviewed_by IS NULL
        AND review_notes IS NULL

listings_update_own.name: listings_update_own
listings_update_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())
listings_update_own.withCheck: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

listings_delete_own_draft.name: listings_delete_own_draft
listings_delete_own_draft.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) AND status = 'draft'

orders_select_cook.name: orders_select_cook
orders_select_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

orders_insert_client.name: orders_insert_client
orders_insert_client.withCheck:
client_id = auth.uid()
        AND status = 'pending'
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM listings l
          WHERE l.id = orders.listing_id
            AND l.status = 'active'
            AND l.cook_id = orders.cook_id
            AND l.base_price = orders.unit_price
        )
        AND orders.total_price = orders.unit_price * orders.quantity

orders_update_cook.name: orders_update_cook
orders_update_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) AND status IN ('pending', 'confirmed', 'ready')
orders_update_cook.withCheck: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) AND status IN ('confirmed', 'ready', 'fulfilled', 'cancelled')

reviews_select_own.name: reviews_select_own
reviews_select_own.using: client_id = auth.uid() OR cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

reviews_insert_client.name: reviews_insert_client
reviews_insert_client.withCheck:
client_id = auth.uid()
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM orders o
          WHERE o.id = reviews.order_id
            AND o.client_id = auth.uid()
            AND o.status = 'fulfilled'
            AND o.cook_id = reviews.cook_id
            AND o.listing_id = reviews.listing_id
        )

cook_profile_tags_insert_own.name: cook_profile_tags_insert_own
cook_profile_tags_insert_own.withCheck: cook_profile_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

cook_profile_tags_delete_own.name: cook_profile_tags_delete_own
cook_profile_tags_delete_own.using: cook_profile_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())
